description: A utility company needs hour-by-hour generation profiles from a residential PV installation to plan grid integration. Simulate a 7.5 kW fixed south-facing residential system in Tucson, Arizona. Export the hourly AC power output for a typical year (8,760 hours, including a header row) to /home/ga/Documents/SAM_Projects/Tucson_Hourly_Production.csv and a summary file containing system configuration, annual totals, and peak hourly output to /home/ga/Documents/SAM_Projects/Tucson_Hourly_Summary.json.
